g.text: -> Collect structured log events & store in a db for analyzing

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: -> The logs have to be analyzed to find the root-cause and resolution if there's seems to be an issue

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: -> Use a pre-defined knowledge base to get the appropriate response for the issues

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: -> Use AI for getting the Most relevant answers, and if AI cannot find a response, mark it for human intervention

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: -> Provide an API to fetch all the issues where a human intervention is required
